docs.title: Watts Vision+ Homey App
docs.text:
Unofficial Homey integration for the Watts Vision+ heating system.

Homey test store page: https://homey.app/a/com.watts.vision/test/

This project connects Homey to the Watts Vision+ cloud so thermostats can be controlled from Homey and used in flows.

docs.title: Homey Flows
docs.text: Guide to setting up Homey flows with the Watts Vision+ integration.

docs.text: Instructions for installing the Watts Vision+ Homey App.
